name: precision: shell commands shown to the user are not commands the agent ran
note: VERBATIM from a real captured turn. The agent printed install/run instructions for the human to copy. These code-fence lines parse as claims with path/literal targets, find no matching event, and become phantoms. Instructions-to-the-reader are not self-claims of execution.
prompt: how do i run the report?
claim:
cd /path/to/your/orunmila    # the clone whose hooks are wired into .claude/settings.json
node bin/orunmila.js glove
Open the `orunmila-glove-<session>.html` it writes.
